title: FG_Timeout Property
description:
This property sets the time-out period of the force guide object.

When it is not satisfied conditions enabled in ForceCheckEnabled or IOCheckEnabled after the time specified by Timeout has passed, it is determined as failure of the Relax object.

After the determination, abort the force guide sequence according to AbortSeqOnFail or proceed to the next force guide object.

When ForceCheckEnabled and IOCheckEnabled are False, end the force guide object after the time specified by Timeout is passed.  Determine as succeeded and proceed to the next force guide object.

Values

Minimum value 0.1

Maximum value 60

Default:  10
see_also:
Applies To

Contact Object, Relax Object, SurfaceAlign Object, ContactProbe Object, Press Object

ForceCheckEnabled Property
